mapper.select: SELECT adm_user_id, login_id, hash_pw, name, role_cd, user_stat_cd FROM scms_adm_user_m WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO scms_adm_user_m ( login_id, hash_pw, name, role_cd, user_stat_cd, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{hashPw}, #{name}, #{roleCd}, #{userStatCd}, NOW() )
